payload.answer: SQL debug execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. The request was not executed and no memory was read or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable memory should be created from an admin SQL debug command.

details: Rejected /brain admin sql request because SQL debug access is disabled.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in an appropriate administrative environment before retrying.
Use supported non-SQL admin/debug commands if available.
